description: An investigative journalist has obtained a 5,000-ballot representative sample of the Cast Vote Record (CVR) from the August 2022 Alaska Special Congressional Election, located at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/alaska_2022_cvr_sample.csv. Tabulate the election results for Mary Peltola, Sarah Palin, and Nick Begich using ranked-choice voting logic, including Round 1 totals, candidate elimination, and Round 2 redistribution based on 'Rank_2_Choice'. Save the completed analysis, including a 'Tabulation' sheet, as a structured workbook at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/rcv_tabulation_final.xlsx.
